description: Mexican criminal cartel founded in 2009 under the tutelage of Edgar Valdez Villarreal (La Barbie). Its first leader was Francisco Javier Hernández Gómez (Pancho Cayagua), executed in 2017. The organization engages in drug trafficking, kidnapping, extortion, and homicide, operating primarily in Mexico City's metropolitan area. It has an estimated 7,500 members as of 2022 and is allied with the CJNG.
